prompt:
Ultra-premium 3D render of a stylized multi-level sales funnel, centered on pure black background (#000000). Aspect ratio 9:16 portrait. Cinema4D / Octane render quality.

SUBJECT:
One vertical 3D funnel composed of 4 STACKED HORIZONTAL BANDS/LEVELS, each a different brand color. Shown from a slight 3/4 perspective (~12° down angle) so the elliptical top rim and each band's thickness are visible. Classic sales-funnel silhouette: widest at top, each band progressively narrower than the one above, tapering to a cylindrical spout at the bottom.

The funnel occupies approximately 75% of canvas width at the widest (top) and 88% of canvas height total. Centered horizontally in the canvas.

EXACT MM AGENCY BRAND COLORS (from top to bottom — use these HEX values precisely, no deviation):

1. TOP BAND (widest, ~24% of total height):
   - Base color: VIOLET #713DFF
   - Highlights: light violet #C8A4FF on the upper-left curve
   - Shadow side: deep violet #2E1A6B on the lower-right edge

2. SECOND BAND (~22% of total height, narrower):
   - Base color: ORANGE #F54900
   - Highlights: warm lighter orange #FF7A3A
   - Shadow side: deep burnt orange #B22E00

3. THIRD BAND (~20% of total height, narrower still):
   - Base color: CYAN #00E3FF
   - Highlights: bright pale cyan #A0F5FF
   - Shadow side: deep teal #007A8A

4. FOURTH BAND (~18% of total height, narrowest main level):
   - Base color: YELLOW #FAFA00
   - Highlights: soft pale yellow #FFFF99
   - Shadow side: deep golden yellow #B8B800

5. Below the 4th band: short cylindrical SPOUT (~14% of height):
   - Color: deep violet #2E1A6B — the outflow point, matches brand violet-deep

BAND STRUCTURE DETAILS:
- Each band is a distinct 3D ring segment with visible thickness (~4% of canvas) on top and bottom edges
- Clean crisp seams between bands — dark ambient occlusion line where colors meet
- Each band has a slight outer curve (convex), reading as a solid ring
- The top rim of band 1 shows the elliptical opening with interior shadow

MATERIAL:
- All bands: glossy polished plastic, NOT metallic, NOT glass, NOT transparent
- Smooth specular highlight strip on the upper-left curve of each band
- Fresnel rim light on the right edges for separation from black background
- Rich saturated colors — the exact brand hex values as described above

LIGHTING:
- Three-point studio lighting
- Key light: upper-left, neutral warm white, creates primary highlights
- Fill light: front-low, very soft, lifts shadows slightly
- Rim light: upper-right-back, cool white, creates edge definition
- Soft contact shadow directly below the spout on black (~20% opacity halo)

NO TEXT. NO LABELS. NO LETTERS. NO NUMBERS. NO ARROWS. NO LINES. NO LOGOS. NO WORDS OF ANY KIND on the funnel or anywhere in the image.

NO additional elements: no spheres above, no tubes, no extra objects, no decorative particles, no liquid, no droplets, no hands, no people, no icons.

Just ONE solitary pristine 4-band funnel with spout on pure black background.

STYLE:
- Premium 3D marketing asset — think Stripe, Linear, Apple product hero
- Bold, iconic, clean, stylized proportions
- NOT photorealistic kitchen object, NOT cartoon, NOT flat 2D
- Everything tack sharp, no DOF blur, no noise, no grain
- Clean glossy surfaces with crisp edges
negative_prompt: text, typography, letters, words, labels, numbers, captions, annotations, logos, writing, arrows, lines, connectors, pointers, spheres, orbs, balls, tubes above, liquid, droplets, pouring, splashing, particles, multiple funnels, duplicate objects, transparent, glass, crystal, see-through, chrome, mirror, metallic, gold, silver, photorealistic kitchen, hands, people, human figures, cartoon, flat design, 2D illustration, vector art, wireframe, low poly, noise, grain, blurry, out of focus, pastel colors, muted colors, washed-out colors, wrong colors, blue bands, green bands, pink bands, red bands, white bands, black bands, gradient background, white background, gray background, colored background, room, floor, table, surface, watermarks, signatures, rainbow

settings.style: premium 3D funnel in exact MM Agency brand colors, NO text
settings.lighting: three-point studio: key upper-left, fill front, rim upper-right-back
settings.quality: ray-traced, clean glossy plastic surfaces, crisp edges, no text
